identity_acceptance_standard: same recognizable designed character; exact pixel-level identity is not claimed

canonical_character_spec.hair: short dark hair with a fixed rounded side-swept silhouette
canonical_character_spec.face: simple softly angular face with small dark eyes and a short straight nose
canonical_character_spec.top: teal long-sleeve top with a small round collar and narrow fixed cuffs
canonical_character_spec.shoulder_to_head_ratio: approximately 2.4 shoulder widths per head width
canonical_character_spec.line_style: uniform clean charcoal line, approximately 3 px at 768x1344
canonical_character_spec.palette: teal, dark charcoal, warm medium-light skin, warm orange accents

character_identity_prompt: CFP 1790e6ac5f61c12bda73494dc3166b08213e4656ec80e85bd05c309378874ddf; fixed young adult male: short dark rounded side-swept hair; softly angular face; warm medium-light skin; teal round-collar narrow-cuff long-sleeve top; charcoal trousers; slim build; shoulders/head 2.4; uniform 3px charcoal lines; teal/orange palette.
identity_invariants: young adult male presentation and age group
short dark rounded side-swept hair silhouette
teal long-sleeve top with round collar and narrow cuffs
slim average build and approximate 2.4:1 shoulder-to-head ratio
uniform clean charcoal line and fixed teal/orange palette
forbidden_identity_changes: different gender presentation or age group
different hair color or major hair silhouette
different top color, collar, or cuff design
style_instruction: Minimalist wordless hand-drawn flat illustration, light background.
global_hard_negatives: No extra person, cropped head, malformed hands, text, digits, watermark, duplicates, tiling, or broken lines.

scenes.primary_action: moving hurriedly toward a partly open bag while one key and one notebook are misplaced
scenes.body_pose: standing three-quarter stepping pose with both hands visible
scenes.character_placement: character left of center, open bag on the right

scenes.setting: small entryway shelf and side table
scenes.primary_action: searching the shelf and open bag for one missing key
scenes.primary_prop: single missing-key space on a key tray
scenes.body_pose: bent side-profile searching pose with one hand checking the shelf
scenes.character_placement: character on the right facing left toward the shelf

scenes.setting: evening desk, moon window, warm lamp
scenes.primary_action: writing a checklist with empty checkboxes on blank paper beside a symbol-only grid
scenes.primary_prop: blank grid with empty boxes and three colored circles only
scenes.body_pose: seated upright writing pose with plausible hands
scenes.character_placement: character centered-right, blank planning board on wall left
semantic_hard_negatives: No letters, numbers, labels, readable text, pseudo-writing, or phone.
symbolic_qc_expectations: symbol-only planning grid with empty boxes and two or three colored circles
generated text, pseudo-text, labels, and digits are hard failures

scenes.setting: wardrobe corner with chair and clothes rail
scenes.primary_action: standing while neatly arranging one prepared outfit on a chair
scenes.body_pose: full standing pose holding one folded teal-compatible outfit
scenes.character_placement: character center-left, chair and outfit center-right

scenes.primary_action: placing a water bottle into an open bag; one book, folder, and key ring beside it
scenes.body_pose: kneeling packing pose with plausible hands
scenes.character_placement: character upper-left, bag and objects centered

scenes.primary_action: pausing beside one overfilled open bag with three recognizable unneeded items protruding
scenes.body_pose: mildly overwhelmed standing or kneeling pose with plausible hands
scenes.character_placement: character and bag clearly separated in a readable upper-to-middle composition
semantic_hard_negatives: No chaotic pile or random background clutter.
symbolic_qc_expectations: one overfilled open bag with three recognizable protruding objects
subtitle placement is resolved by practical_dynamic_v1 during rendering

scenes.setting: bright morning doorway with soft sunlight
scenes.primary_action: calmly departing through the doorway while holding the prepared closed bag
scenes.body_pose: relaxed three-quarter walking pose with bag in one hand
scenes.character_placement: character centered in doorway moving outward
